nodes.label: AI as productivity tool for low-risk coding tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for high-stakes research tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Using AI seemed like a no-brainer at that point for productivity purposes

nodes.label: AI reliability in literature search and fact reporting
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability in literature search and fact reporting
nodes.grounding_span: confidence in the comprehensive nature of AI searching and its reporting of details and facts from papers - in my experience it frequently makes mistakes

nodes.label: AI as creative ideation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as lacking creative out-of-the-box ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I think that I personally still wouldn't assume that an AI chatbot would provide me with very creative, out-of-the-box ideas

nodes.label: AI integration with university journal access
nodes.grounding_span: integration into whatever university access system you might have to view specific journals

nodes.label: AI reliability for research community trust
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability undermining research community trust
nodes.grounding_span: it's very important that those tools become much more reliable in their results to foster confidence in what can be a very sceptical community

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: we were often working 'against the clock' with deadlines

nodes.label: Research integrity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to properly read and understand that background research or any research you might be citing

nodes.label: Comprehensive knowledge discovery
nodes.grounding_span: finding literature and being comprehensive and such can be a long process and it's easy to miss things

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for coding productivity
nodes.grounding_span: Using AI seemed like a no-brainer at that point for productivity purposes

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI for literature search due to unreliability
nodes.grounding_span: confidence in the comprehensive nature of AI searching and its reporting of details and facts from papers - in my experience it frequently makes mistakes

nodes.label: Skeptical stance toward AI for creative ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I think that I personally still wouldn't assume that an AI chatbot would provide me with very creative, out-of-the-box ideas

nodes.label: Aspirational stance toward AI for literature search with journal integration
nodes.grounding_span: it would be very helpful to have the bulk of that done by an AI assistant

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI reliability for research community
nodes.grounding_span: it's very important that those tools become much more reliable in their results to foster confidence in what can be a very sceptical community

nodes.label: Risk-based task delegation — distinguishes low-risk from high-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For debugging and code explanation there are no perceived 'risks' or downsides to using AI in research in my opinion

nodes.label: Verification-by-outcome — uses task outcome to validate AI output
nodes.grounding_span: For code debugging the validation is usually part of the process because you can tell whether or not the bug is fixed
